mapper.sql: COUNT(*) as totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'published' THEN 1 END) as publishedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) as draftCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'reviewing' THEN 1 END) as reviewingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 END) as rejectedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_top = 1 THEN 1 END) as topCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_essence = 1 THEN 1 END) as essenceCount, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) as totalViewCount, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) as totalLikeCount, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) as totalCommentCount, COALESCE(SUM(favorite_count), 0) as totalFavoriteCount, COALESCE(SUM(share_count), 0) as totalShareCount

c.id, c.title, c.content, c.rendered_content, c.content_type, c.content_version, c.status, c.author_id, c.channel_id, c.community_id, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.dislike_count, c.comment_count, c.share_count, c.is_top, c.is_recommend, c.is_hot, c.publish_at, c.attachments, c.tags, c.topics, c.summary, c.cover_image, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time

up.id as up_id, up.nickname as up_nickname, -- 昵称 up.avatar as up_avatar, -- 头像 up.bio as up_bio, -- 个人简介 up.website as up_website, -- 个人网站 up.location as up_location, -- 所在地 up.occupation as up_occupation, -- 职业 up.company as up_company, -- 公司 up.school as up_school, -- 学校 up.following_count as up_following_count, -- 关注数 up.followers_count as up_followers_count, -- 粉丝数 up.likes_count as up_likes_count, -- 获赞数 up.content_count as up_content_count, -- 发布内容数 up.points as up_points, -- 积分 up.level as up_level, -- 等级 up.verify_status as up_verify_status, -- 认证状态：0-未认证 1-认证中 2-已认证 3-认证失败 up.verify_type as up_verify_type, -- 认证类型：0-无 1-个人认证 2-大v牛人认证 3-系统官方认证 4-企业认证 5-机构认证 up.verify_info as up_verify_info, -- 认证信息 up.is_vip as up_is_vip, -- 是否VIP：0-否 1-是 up.vip_expire_time as up_vip_expire_time, -- VIP到期时间 up.last_login_time as up_last_login_time, -- 最后登录时间 up.last_active_time as up_last_active_time, -- 最后活跃时间 up.tags as up_tags, -- 个人标签（JSON数组格式） up.interests as up_interests, -- 兴趣爱好（JSON数组格式） up.social_links as up_social_links, -- 社交媒体链接（JSON格式） up.privacy_settings as up_privacy_settings, -- 隐私设置（JSON格式） up.notification_settings as up_notification_settings, -- 通知设置（JSON格式） up.del_flag as up_del_flag, -- 逻辑删除标识：0-正常 1-删除 up.ext_data as up_ext_data, -- 扩展字段（JSON格式） up.create_by as up_create_by, -- 创建人 up.create_time as up_create_time, -- 创建时间 up.update_by as up_update_by

ch.id as ch_id, -- 频道ID ch.channel_name as ch_channel_name, -- 频道名称 ch.description as ch_description, -- 频道描述 ch.channel_avatar as ch_channel_avatar, -- 频道头像 ch.channel_cover_image as ch_channel_cover_image, -- 频道封面图 ch.category as ch_category, -- 频道分类 ch.category_id as ch_category_id, -- 频道分类ID，关联channel_categories表 ch.parent_channel_id as ch_parent_channel_id, -- 父频道ID（支持子频道） ch.owner_id as ch_owner_id, -- 频道创建者ID ch.is_public as ch_is_public, -- 是否公开频道：0-私有 1-公开 ch.join_type as ch_join_type, -- 加入方式：1-自由加入 2-申请加入 3-邀请加入 ch.post_permission as ch_post_permission, -- 发帖权限：0-任何人 1-所有成员 2-版主以上 3-管理员 4-指定成员 ch.allowed_content_types as ch_allowed_content_types, -- 允许的内容类型（JSON数组） ch.view_permission as ch_view_permission, -- 查看权限：0-任何人 1-所有成员 2-管理员 3-指定成员 ch.member_count as ch_member_count, -- 成员数量 ch.content_count as ch_content_count, -- 内容数量 ch.max_members as ch_max_members, -- 最大成员数限制 ch.status as ch_status, ch.sort_order as ch_sort_order, -- 排序权重 ch.is_recommend as ch_is_recommend, -- 是否推荐：0-否 1-是 ch.rules as ch_rules, -- 频道规则 ch.announcement as ch_announcement, -- 频道公告 ch.tags as ch_tags, -- 频道标签（JSON数组） ch.ext_data as ch_ext_data, -- 扩展数据（JSON格式） ch.del_flag as ch_del_flag, -- 删除标识：0-正常 1-删除 ch.create_by as ch_create_by, -- 创建人 ch.create_time as ch_create_time, -- 创建时间 ch.update_by as ch_update_by, -- 更新人 ch.update_time as ch_update_time

cm.id as cm_id, cm.name as cm_name, -- 社区名称 cm.description as cm_description, -- 社区描述 cm.avatar as cm_avatar, -- 社区头像 cm.cover_image as cm_cover_image, -- 社区封面 cm.type as cm_type, -- 社区类型：1-公开 2-私密 3-付费 cm.join_type as cm_join_type, -- 加入方式：1-自由加入 2-申请加入 3-邀请加入 cm.post_permission as cm_post_permission, -- 发帖权限：1-所有成员 2-管理员 3-指定成员 cm.member_count as cm_member_count, -- 成员数量 cm.max_member_count as cm_max_member_count, -- 最大成员数量 cm.content_count as cm_content_count, -- 内容数量 cm.status as cm_status, cm.rules as cm_rules, -- 社区规则 cm.announcement as cm_announcement, -- 社区公告 cm.invite_code as cm_invite_code, -- 邀请码 cm.tags as cm_tags, -- 社区标签 cm.ext_data as cm_ext_data, -- 扩展数据 cm.del_flag as cm_del_flag, -- 逻辑删除标识：0-正常 1-删除 cm.create_by as cm_create_by, -- 创建人 cm.create_time as cm_create_time, -- 创建时间 cm.update_by as cm_update_by, -- 更新人 cm.update_time as cm_update_time
FROM contents c LEFT JOIN user_profile_extension up ON c.author_id = up.id LEFT JOIN channels ch ON c.channel_id = ch.id LEFT JOIN communities cm ON c.community_id = cm.id
SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM contents WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT
FROM contents WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contents WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 1 AND del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL #{days} DAY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contents WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND status = 1 AND del_flag = 0 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT , , ,
WHERE c.del_flag = '0'
AND c.id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
